title: Savory Russian Turkey Dumplings
description: A crowd-pleasing Russian dish featuring turkey and ferment-kimchi, this recipe is a briny and chewy delight that is also vegetarian-friendly with optional turkey, it is a great option for a dinner party
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground turkey, if using, ferment-kimchi, flour, eggs, salt, and pepper, and mix until just combined
Knead the mixture for about 5 minutes until it forms a sticky dough
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings
Cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and drain off any excess water
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add the cooked dumplings
Cook the dumplings for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve hot
